entity.name: Open Science Labs
entity.description: Open Science Labs (OSL) is a non-profit organisation dedicated to creating and sustaining innovative FOSS projects.

projects.name: IRx
projects.description: IRx is a Python library that serves as the LLVM backend for ARXLang, enabling high-level ASTx programs to be compiled into executable machine code.

projects.name: SciArx
projects.description: SciArx is a scientific computing library written in ArxLang, with native Apache Arrow datatype support.

projects.name: ARx
projects.description: ARx is a programming language that targets multi-architecture native code and integrates directly with Apache Arrow through LLVM-based code generation.

projects.name: Sugar
projects.description: Sugar simplifies the usage of containers and container stacks for reproducible development workflows.

projects.name: Makim
projects.description: Makim is a YAML-based task automation tool focused on task definition, dependencies, and conditional execution.

projects.name: SciCookie
projects.description: SciCookie is a Cookiecutter-based template that helps teams bootstrap Python projects from reusable project templates.

projects.name: ArtBox
projects.description: ArtBox processes multimedia files, including speech-to-text, text-to-speech, and other media workflows.

channels.description: We use Open Collective for receiving funds.

plans.name: Hosting support
plans.description: This covers infrastructure and hosting costs for OSL projects.

plans.name: Developer support
plans.description: This supports part-time developer time across OSL projects.

plans.name: Goodwill plan
plans.description: Give any amount to support OSL and its projects.
